ucs.title: [LLM] APT37/ScarCruft ROKRAT cloud-API C2 from non-browser process (pCloud, Dropbox, Yandex)
ucs.description: Detects ROKRAT and successor implants used by APT37 (ScarCruft / Reaper / Ricochet Chollima / InkySquid) that beacon to legitimate cloud-storage REST endpoints — specifically pCloud, Dropbox content API, Yandex Disk, and Box — for bidirectional C2 and exfil. The signal is a non-browser, non-sync-client process making TLS calls to those FQDNs.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as dest_ip values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port values(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest="api.pcloud.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="eapi.pcloud.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="content.dropboxapi.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="api.dropboxapi.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="cloud-api.yandex.net" OR All_Traffic.dest="webdav.yandex.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="upload.box.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="api.box.com") by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.user All_Traffic.app All_Traffic.process_name host All_Traffic.dest | rename All_Traffic.* as * | search NOT (process_name IN ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe","safari.exe","Dropbox.exe","DropboxUpdate.exe","pCloud.exe","Yandex.Disk.exe","Yandex.Disk.2.exe","Box.exe","BoxSync.exe","BoxDrive.exe","BoxEdit.exe")) | join type=left host process_name [| tstats summariesonly=true values(Processes.process) as process_cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent_process_name from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes by Processes.dest Processes.process_name | rename Processes.dest as host Processes.process_name as process_name] | eval suspicious_parent=if(match(parent_process_name,"(?i)(mshta|powershell|cmd|wscript|cscript|rundll32|regsvr32|hh|certutil|explorer|hwp|winword|excel|outlook|gswin)\.exe"),1,0) | where suspicious_parent=1 OR match(process_name,"(?i)\.tmp$|^[a-f0-9]{6,}\.exe$") | table firstTime lastTime host src user process_name parent_process_name process_cmd dest dest_ip dest_port bytes_out | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
// APT37/ScarCruft — ROKRAT family beaconing to cloud storage REST APIs from non-browser/non-sync processes
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _ScarCruftCloudEndpoints = dynamic([
    "api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com",
    "content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com",
    "cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.com",
    "api.box.com","upload.box.com"
]);
let _LegitClients = dynamic([
    "chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe",
    "dropbox.exe","dropboxupdate.exe","pcloud.exe","yandex.disk.exe","yandex.disk.2.exe",
    "box.exe","boxsync.exe","boxdrive.exe","boxedit.exe","onedrive.exe"
]);
let CloudHits =
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","HttpConnectionInspected")
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | where isnotempty(RemoteUrl)
    | where RemoteUrl has_any (_ScarCruftCloudEndpoints)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (_LegitClients)
    | where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$";
// Pivot to the spawning process tree — ROKRAT loaders are typically launched by
// mshta/powershell/rundll32/hh.exe (CHM) / gswin (Ghostscript) / Office apps
CloudHits
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | project ProcStart = Timestamp, DeviceId, ProcessId, FileName,
              FolderPath, ProcessCommandLine,
              ParentName = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ParentCmd  = InitiatingProcessCommandLine
  ) on $left.DeviceId == $right.DeviceId,
     $left.InitiatingProcessId == $right.ProcessId
| where ProcStart between (Timestamp - 30m .. Timestamp)
| extend SuspiciousAncestry = ParentName in~ (
    "mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe",
    "rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","hh.exe","certutil.exe","explorer.exe",
    "winword.exe","excel.exe","outlook.exe","hwp.exe","hword.exe","gswin64c.exe","gswin32c.exe")
| extend AnomalousImagePath = FolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\Public\", @"\ProgramData\")
| where SuspiciousAncestry or AnomalousImagePath or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\Temp\", @"\Public\")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          InitiatingProcessCommandLine, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort,
          ParentName, ParentCmd, ChildImagePath = FolderPath, ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT37/ScarCruft — ROKRAT cloud-storage API C2 (Sentinel via ASIM)
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _ScarCruftCloudEndpoints = dynamic([
    "api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com",
    "content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com",
    "cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.com",
    "api.box.com","upload.box.com"
]);
let _LegitClients = dynamic([
    "chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe",
    "dropbox.exe","dropboxupdate.exe","pcloud.exe","yandex.disk.exe","yandex.disk.2.exe",
    "box.exe","boxsync.exe","boxdrive.exe","boxedit.exe","onedrive.exe"
]);
let CloudHits =
    ImWebSession
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventResult == "Success"
    | where isnotempty(Url)
    | where Url has_any (_ScarCruftCloudEndpoints) or HttpHostName has_any (_ScarCruftCloudEndpoints)
    | extend ProcLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(coalesce(column_ifexists("ActingProcessName", ""), ""), "\\")[-1]))
    | where ProcLeaf !in~ (_LegitClients)
    | project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, SrcIpAddr, SrcUsername, Url, HttpHostName, ProcLeaf,
              ActingProcessName = column_ifexists("ActingProcessName", "");
CloudHits
| join kind=leftouter (
    ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | project ProcStart = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActingProcessName,
              ActingProcessCommandLine, ParentProcessName, ParentProcessCommandLine
  ) on DvcHostname, ActingProcessName
| where ProcStart between (TimeGenerated - 30m .. TimeGenerated)
| extend SuspiciousAncestry = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])) in~ (
    "mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe",
    "rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","hh.exe","certutil.exe","explorer.exe",
    "winword.exe","excel.exe","outlook.exe","hwp.exe","hword.exe","gswin64c.exe","gswin32c.exe")
| where SuspiciousAncestry or ActingProcessCommandLine has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\Temp\", @"\Public\", @"\ProgramData\")
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, SrcUsername, SrcIpAddr,
          Url, HttpHostName, ActingProcessName, ActingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentProcessName, ParentProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft ROKRAT Cloud Storage API C2
id: 6f1f3a82-7a73-4d31-9c07-3c1d3a2e0f01
status: experimental
description: Detects ROKRAT/Dolphin/Goldbackdoor-style C2 used by APT37 (ScarCruft) where a non-browser, non-sync-client process talks to pCloud/Dropbox/Yandex/Box REST APIs.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/rokrat-analysis/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.t1102.002
  - attack.t1071.001
  - apt37
  - scarcruft
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_dest:
    DestinationHostname|contains:
      - 'api.pcloud.com'
      - 'eapi.pcloud.com'
      - 'content.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'api.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'cloud-api.yandex.net'
      - 'webdav.yandex.com'
      - 'api.box.com'
      - 'upload.box.com'
  filter_legit_clients:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\chrome.exe'
      - '\msedge.exe'
      - '\firefox.exe'
      - '\brave.exe'
      - '\iexplore.exe'
      - '\Dropbox.exe'
      - '\DropboxUpdate.exe'
      - '\pCloud.exe'
      - '\Yandex.Disk.exe'
      - '\Yandex.Disk.2.exe'
      - '\Box.exe'
      - '\BoxSync.exe'
      - '\BoxDrive.exe'
      - '\OneDrive.exe'
  condition: selection_dest and not filter_legit_clients
falsepositives:
  - Custom internal tooling that legitimately uses these cloud APIs (rare; allowlist by SHA256)
level: high
ucs.rationale: ROKRAT and the wider ScarCruft toolset (Dolphin, Goldbackdoor, M2RAT, Chinotto) is publicly documented (Talos, ESET, Kaspersky, AhnLab) as APT37's signature pattern of using legitimate cloud-storage REST endpoints — pCloud is the longest-running and near-pathognomonic — so they can blend with normal HTTPS to api.pcloud.com / content.dropboxapi.com / cloud-api.yandex.net. Generic C2 rules miss this
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma tag must start with namespace separated with dot from remaining tag.

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37/ScarCruft weaponized document chain: HWP/CHM/LNK → mshta/powershell with cloud-fetch
ucs.description: Hunts APT37's characteristic delivery → execution chain: a Hangul Word Processor (hwp.exe / hword.exe), Microsoft Help Compiled (hh.exe handling .chm), or explorer.exe-launched .lnk that immediately spawns mshta.exe, powershell.exe, or rundll32.exe pulling a remote payload. This combo is the public signature of campaigns like 'Operation Daybreak', 'GoldDragon', RoKRAT/CHM, and the 2022-2024 LNK→PowerShell waves attributed to ScarCruft.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_path) as image values(Processes.user) as user values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("hh.exe","hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe","explorer.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe")) AND (Processes.process_name IN ("mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","cmd.exe")) AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") by host Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name | rename Processes.* as * | eval is_remote_fetch=if(match(cmdline,"(?i)(http[s]?://|FromBase64String|DownloadString|DownloadFile|Invoke-WebRequest|IEX|Invoke-Expression|certutil.*-urlcache|bitsadmin.*transfer|curl|wget|mshta\s+http|javascript:)"),1,0) | eval is_chm=if(parent_process_name="hh.exe",1,0) | eval is_hwp=if(match(parent_process_name,"(?i)^h(wp|word|cell|show)\.exe$"),1,0) | eval is_lnk_via_explorer=if(parent_process_name="explorer.exe" AND match(cmdline,"(?i)(-w\s+(hidden|1)|-windowstyle\s+hidden|-nop|-noprofile|FromBase64String|http)"),1,0) | eval is_office_macro=if(match(parent_process_name,"(?i)^(winword|excel|powerpnt|outlook)\.exe$") AND is_remote_fetch=1,1,0) | eval scarcruft_score=is_chm+is_hwp+is_lnk_via_explorer+is_office_macro+is_remote_fetch | where scarcruft_score>=2 | table firstTime lastTime host user parent_process_name process_name cmdline parent_cmd image is_chm is_hwp is_lnk_via_explorer is_office_macro is_remote_fetch | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// APT37/ScarCruft weaponized-document chain: HWP/CHM/LNK/Office -> mshta|powershell|rundll32 with remote fetch
let LookbackDays = 14d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (
    "hh.exe",                                  // CHM — APT37 RoKRAT/CHM campaigns
    "hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe", // Hangul Office — KR-targeted lures
    "explorer.exe",                            // .lnk double-click
    "winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe",
    "gswin64c.exe","gswin32c.exe"              // Ghostscript — APT37 PDF lure chain
  )
| where FileName in~ ("mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","cmd.exe")
| extend Cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| extend IsRemoteFetch = Cmd has_any ("http://","https://","frombase64string","downloadstring","downloadfile","invoke-webrequest","iex","invoke-expression","certutil","bitsadmin","curl ","wget ","javascript:")
| extend IsHidden = Cmd matches regex @"-w(in)?(dow)?style?\s+(h(idden)?|1)" or Cmd has_any ("-nop ","-noprofile","-enc ","-encodedcommand","-ec "," -e ")
| extend IsCHM = InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "hh.exe"
| extend IsHWP = InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe")
| extend IsLnkChain = InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "explorer.exe" and (IsRemoteFetch or IsHidden)
| extend IsOfficeChild = InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe") and IsRemoteFetch
| extend ScarCruftScore = toint(IsCHM) + toint(IsHWP) + toint(IsLnkChain) + toint(IsOfficeChild) + toint(IsRemoteFetch) + toint(IsHidden)
| where ScarCruftScore >= 2
// Suppress benign Office Click-to-Run repair (signed MS paths) — keep user-temp / appdata launches in scope
| where not(FolderPath startswith @"C:\Program Files\" and IsOfficeChild and not(IsRemoteFetch))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentName  = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ChildImage  = FolderPath,
          ChildName   = FileName,
          ChildCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
          IsCHM, IsHWP, IsLnkChain, IsOfficeChild, IsRemoteFetch, IsHidden, ScarCruftScore,
          SHA256
| order by ScarCruftScore desc, Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT37/ScarCruft weaponized-document chain (Sentinel — SecurityEvent 4688 / ImProcessCreate)
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let _APT37Parents = dynamic([
    "hh.exe","hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe",
    "explorer.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe",
    "gswin64c.exe","gswin32c.exe"]);
let _LolBins = dynamic([
    "mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe",
    "wscript.exe","cscript.exe","cmd.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User" and not(Account endswith "$")
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         Cmd        = tolower(CommandLine)
| where ParentLeaf in (_APT37Parents) and ChildLeaf in (_LolBins)
| extend IsRemoteFetch = Cmd has_any ("http://","https://","frombase64string","downloadstring","downloadfile","invoke-webrequest","iex","invoke-expression","certutil","bitsadmin","curl ","wget ","javascript:")
| extend IsHidden = Cmd matches regex @"-w(in)?(dow)?style?\s+(h(idden)?|1)" or Cmd has_any ("-nop ","-noprofile","-enc ","-encodedcommand","-ec ")
| extend IsCHM         = ParentLeaf == "hh.exe",
         IsHWP         = ParentLeaf in ("hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe"),
         IsLnkChain    = ParentLeaf == "explorer.exe" and (IsRemoteFetch or IsHidden),
         IsOfficeChild = ParentLeaf in ("winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe") and IsRemoteFetch
| extend ScarCruftScore = toint(IsCHM) + toint(IsHWP) + toint(IsLnkChain) + toint(IsOfficeChild) + toint(IsRemoteFetch) + toint(IsHidden)
| where ScarCruftScore >= 2
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          IsCHM, IsHWP, IsLnkChain, IsOfficeChild, IsRemoteFetch, IsHidden, ScarCruftScore,
          TokenElevationType
| order by ScarCruftScore desc, TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: APT37 (CrowdStrike: Ricochet Chollima; Microsoft: not yet a Blizzard cluster, tracked under historic G0067; FireEye/Mandiant: TEMP.Reaper) uniquely targets South Korean and adjacent victims with Hangul HWP documents (hwp.exe), CHM lures executed by hh.exe, and Ghostscript-based PDF exploit chains — none of which are common in Western threat groups. The combination of an *hh.exe / hwp.exe / gswin*.

_field_issues.message: `Program` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`Files` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `FileSize`?
`IsOfficeChild` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`IsCHM` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`IsHWP` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`IsLnkChain` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`IsHidden` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`ScarCruftScore` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `IsCHM` is not a canonical column of SecurityEvent.
`IsHWP` is not a canonical column of SecurityEvent.
`IsLnkChain` is not a canonical column of SecurityEvent.

`IsHidden` is not a canonical column of SecurityEvent.
